prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南师范大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约13744名、14760名、14769名、16267名、16237名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2024年累计后 移约2523名，2025年较2024年微升约30名，基本稳定在16200名附近。近3年（2023–2025）位次在14769–16267之间波动，2025年基准位次约16237名；该校在北 京市综合类招生计划2021年27人、2022年28人、2023年28人、2024年29人、2025年25人、2026年26人。2026年计划较2025年增加1人，小幅扩招约4%，对竞争 压力有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第92名（2025年第88名），近年排名略有下降，但仍属全国百强 师范类院校，在师范类高校中具有较高认可度；2025年高考周期内该校出现偏负面声誉事件（文学院教授公开羞辱求助学生引发舆论争议），对报考心理有一定 负面影响；2026年周期内无重大声誉事件记录。抖音热度排名第100位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台关注度不高，未形成明显报考热度效应。历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信 号；第五轮学科评估中，湖南师范大学A-及以上学科为外国语言文学（A-），为该校唯一A类学科。该校在师范类学科群（教育学、中国语言文学等）及生物科 学、化学等领域亦有较强实力，与招生专业中的外国语言文学类、汉语言文学（师范）等直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业2024年社会热度评估为“分化观望” ，整体热度一般；法学、汉语言文学等文科专业社会热度偏热。北京市2021–2026年高考考生总数分别为42037、44958、55201、55936、65434、84900人，2026年较2025年大幅增 长约29.7%，竞争显著加剧。；湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙 市，属跨省招生。该校在北京市招生人数较少（2025年25人），占该校全国招生总人数比例极低，属于典型的外省招生模式。北京考生对师范类院校的地域偏好一般，跨省报考湖 南师范大学需考虑地域适应因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：历年位次整体后移趋势明确，2026年北京市考生总数大幅增长约29.7%是推高位次数字的最关键因素，2026年 招生计划小幅扩招4%有轻微缓解作用，学校声誉偏负面及软科排名小幅下滑亦构成轻微负面影响。在2025年基准16237名基础上，经，再结合考生规模激增、声誉偏负面等因素小幅上调，预测2026年最低录取位次约16657名，波动区间16157–17157名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 汉语言文学（师范）（含世承书院中国语言文学基地班）
- 外国语言文学类（含世承书院鍾书班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 历史学（师范）（含世承书院历史学国家文科基地班）
- 思想政治教育（师范）
- 地理科学（师范）/地理信息科学

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 通信工程
- 应用心理学/心理学（师范）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约16657名，区间16157–17157名。位次在预测区间下限（16157名）以内可重点冲刺一档法学、汉语言文学（师范）等热门专业；位次在区间中段（约16657名附近）建 议以二档师范类专业为主，兼顾一档中位次要求相对较低的外国语言文学类；位次在区间上限（17157名）附近建议以三档专业保底，优先考虑通信工程等工科专业。该校为211师 范类院校，师范类专业就业稳定性较高，适合有志于教育行业的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 13,744, 14,760, 14,769, 16,267, and 16,237, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative backward shift was about 2,523 places, and in 2025, it slightly increased by about 30 places compared to 2024, stabilizing around 16,200. In the past three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated between 14,769 and 16,267, with the 2025 baseline ranking at approximately 16,237. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Beijing was 27 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 26 in 2026. The 2026 plan increased by 1 person compared to 2025, a slight expansion of about 4%, which slightly alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 92nd (88th in 2025), showing a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 national normal universities, with high recognition in the normal university category. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, a negative reputation incident occurred (a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, causing public controversy), which had a certain negative impact on application psychology. In the 2026 cycle, no major reputation incidents were recorded. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms and no significant application heat effect. No historical admission anomalies such as gaps were observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan Normal University's A- and above disciplines include Foreign Language and Literature (A-), its only A-class discipline. The university also has strong strength in normal discipline groups (Education, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.) as well as in Biological Sciences, Chemistry, etc., directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Foreign Language and Literature, and Chinese Language and Literature (Normal).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of normal/education majors is assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with overall average popularity. Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are relatively hot. The total number of college entrance examination candidates in Beijing from 2021 to 2026 was 42,037, 44,958, 55,201, 55,936, 65,434, and 84,900 respectively, with a significant increase of about 29.7% in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and recruits across provinces. The number of students enrolled in Beijing is small (25 in 2025), accounting for a very low proportion of the university's total national enrollment, typical of out-of-province enrollment. Beijing candidates have average regional preference for normal universities, and cross-province application to Hunan Normal University requires consideration of regional adaptation factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the historical ranking shows a clear backward trend. The significant increase of about 29.7% in the number of Beijing candidates in 2026 is the most critical factor pushing up the ranking number. The slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 4% has a slight alleviating effect. The negative reputation and slight decline in Soft Science ranking also constitute slight negative impacts. Based on the 2025 baseline of 16,237, and considering the surge in candidate numbers and negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 16,657, with a fluctuation range of 16,157–17,157.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature (Normal) (including Shicheng College Chinese Language and Literature Base Class)
- Foreign Language and Literature (including Shicheng College Zhongshu Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- History (Normal) (including Shicheng College History National Liberal Arts Base Class)
- Ideological and Political Education (Normal)
- Geographical Science (Normal)/Geographic Information Science
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal) (including Shicheng College Tianwen Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Physics (Normal) (including Shicheng College Zhou Guangzhao Class)
- Chemistry (Normal) (including Shicheng College Haoqing Class)
- Communication Engineering
- Applied Psychology/Psychology (Normal).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 16,657, with a range of 16,157–17,157. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the prediction range (16,157) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature (Normal). Those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 16,657) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 normal majors, while also considering Tier 1 Foreign Language and Literature, which has relatively lower ranking requirements. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (17,157) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing engineering majors such as Communication Engineering. This university is a 211 normal university, and normal majors offer relatively high employment stability, suitable for candidates aspiring to the education industry.
